action: Lock setup-known heater/cooler/test-section source/sink rows by case and segment.
outputs: source/sink ledger with split role and runtime policy
stop_rule: Stop if any source row uses realized wallHeatFlux or protected temperatures.

action: Lock wall, insulation, quartz, contact, area, and coverage fields by segment.
inputs_allowed: setup geometry; material properties; layer metadata
stop_rule: Stop if material fields are inferred from held-out residual.

action: Lock h_ext, Ta, Tsur, emissivity, radiation semantics, and jacket/cooler setup fields.
inputs_allowed: setup BC dictionary; ambient/surroundings; HX metadata
stop_rule: Stop if imposed CFD cooler duty or realized wallHeatFlux becomes runtime input.

action: Run train/support-only UQ over source, property, external BC, and resistance-network lanes.
inputs_allowed: train/support rows only; fixed candidate equations
outputs: sensitivity table for mdot, TP/TW, heat ledger, residual owner
stop_rule: Stop before validation/holdout/external rows or model selection.

action: Assign remaining residual to heater, cooler, passive, test-section, wall, storage, recirculation, or unknown.
stop_rule: Stop if residual is moved into internal Nu or global multiplier.

action: Freeze one candidate only if source/property, same-QOI UQ, and runtime input audits pass.
inputs_allowed: train/support only; fixed coefficients and inputs
outputs: frozen manifest or fail-closed no-freeze decision
stop_rule: Stop if release-ready rows remain zero.

action: Only after freeze, score validation/holdout/external rows exactly once.
stop_rule: No post-score tuning or candidate changes.
